person.name: Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland

nameForms.fullText: Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland

memoryArtifacts.headline: BORU Brian (b 941) Modern unofficial O'Bryan clan kilt, as of 2017
memoryArtifacts.description: This tartan was designed and registered with the Scottish Tartan Society by Ted O'Brien of Australia and he has allowed it to be worn by any and all O'Briens and variations of the name. It has been used on many websites. This tartan is NOT the official O'Brien Clan tartan. A traditional Irish kilt is solid colors. So the royal saffron solid color is used for the O'Brien clan at festivals.

popularStory.headline: A brief history from Wikipedia
popularStory.description: Many Irish annals state that Brian was in his 88th year when he fell in the Battle of Clontarf in 1014. If true, this would mean that he was born as early as 926 or 927.[2] Other birth dates given in …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland於0941年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾吉拉阿洛時，他的父親Cennétig Mac Lorcáin46歲，母親Bé Binn Inion Urchadh45歲。他於大約0970年與Echrad ingen Carlus結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1014年4月23日在愛爾蘭庫迪 度布林可隆塔福享年73歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 阿馬格阿馬格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland于0941年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾吉拉阿洛时，他的父亲Cennétig Mac Lorcáin46岁，母亲Bé Binn Inion Urchadh45岁。他于大约0970年与Echrad ingen Carlus结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1014年4月23日在爱尔兰庫迪 度布林可隆塔福享年73岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 阿馬格阿馬格。

nameMeanings.name: Brian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Irish origin: perhaps from an Old Celtic word meaning ‘high’ or ‘noble’. The name has been perennially popular in Ireland, in particular on account of the fame of Brian Boru (Gaelic Brian Bóroimhe) ( c. 940–1014 ), a warrior who was credited with driving the Vikings from Ireland and who eventually became high king of Ireland. In the Middle Ages it was relatively common in East Anglia, where it was introduced by Breton settlers, and in northern England, where it was introduced by Scandinavians from Ireland. It was quite popular in Yorkshire in the early 16th century, largely because it had long been a family name among the Stapletons, who had Irish connections. They first used it after Sir Gilbert Stapleton married Agnes , the daughter of the great northern baron Sir Brian fitzAlan . In Gaelic Scotland it was at first borne exclusively by members of certain professional families of Irish origin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: Variant of   Brian  , influenced by the usual spelling of the associated surname.

nameMeanings.name: Bóruma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Bronislaw, Tadeusz.
Polish: from a derivative of Borzysław, Bolebor,or some other personal name formed with bor ‘to fight’.

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Mark  , now also quite popular in the English-speaking world. It was given some currency in England in the 1960s by the pop singer  Marc Bolan  (  1947–77 ).

variants.name: Mark
meanings: From the Latin name Marcus , borne by the Evangelist, author of the second gospel in the New Testament, and by several other early and medieval saints. In Arthurian legend, King Mark is the aged ruler of Cornwall to whom Isolde is brought as a bride by Tristan; his name was presumably of Celtic origin, perhaps derived from the element march ‘horse’. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages but was in more frequent use by the end of the 16th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland was born in 0941, in Killaloe, County Clare, Ireland, his father, Cennétig Mac Lorcáin, was 46 and his mother, Bé Binn Inion Urchadh, was 45. He married Echrad ingen Carlus about 0970. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 April 1014, in Clontarf, County Dublin, Ireland, at the age of 73, and was buried in Armagh, County Armagh, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland est né en 0941, à Killaloe, County Clare, Irlande, son père, Cennétig Mac Lorcáin, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Bé Binn Inion Urchadh, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Echrad ingen Carlus environ 0970. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1014, à Clontarf, County Dublin, Irlande, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Armagh, County Armagh, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland 0941 in Killaloe, County Clare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cennétig Mac Lorcáin 46 und seine Mutter Bé Binn Inion Urchadh 45. Er hat um 0970 Echrad ingen Carlus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. April 1014 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Clontarf, County Dublin, Irland und wurde in Armagh, County Armagh, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland è nato il nel 0941 nel Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Cennétig Mac Lorcáin, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Bé Binn Inion Urchadh, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Echrad ingen Carlus circa 0970. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1014, nel Clontarf, County Dublin, Irlanda, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Armagh, County Armagh, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Irelandが0941年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーキラロで生まれた時，父Cennétig Mac Lorcáinは46歳，母Bé Binn Inion Urchadhは45歳であった。約0970年にEchrad ingen Carlusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1014年4月23日にアイルランドコウントイ ダブリンクロンターフで73歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ アルマグアルマグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland(이)가 0941년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 킬라로이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cennétig Mac Lorcáin(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Bé Binn Inion Urchadh(은)는 45세였다. 그는 대략 0970년 Echrad ingen Carlus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1014년 4월 23일 아일랜드 카운티 드블린 클론타르프에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 아마그h 아마그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland nasceu em 0941, em Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda, seu pai, Cennétig Mac Lorcáin, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Bé Binn Inion Urchadh, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Echrad ingen Carlus aproximadamente 0970. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1014, em Clontarf, County Dublin, Irlanda, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Armagh, County Armagh, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland родился в 0941 г. в местности киллало, коунти клар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Cennétig Mac Lorcáin было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Bé Binn Inion Urchadh, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Echrad ingen Carlus около 0970 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 апреля 1014 г. в местности клонтарф, коунти дублинь, Ирландия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности армаг, коунти армаг, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Brian Bóruma Mac Cennétig High King of Ireland nació en 0941, en Killaloe, County Clare, Irlanda, su papá, Cennétig Mac Lorcáin, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Bé Binn Inion Urchadh, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Echrad ingen Carlus aproximadamente 0970. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1014, en Clontarf, County Dublin, Irlanda, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Armagh, County Armagh, Irlanda.
